name: Stuffed Cabbage Leaves
recipeIngredient: 2 links of Wild Boar sausage (cut into 4 equal pieces)
2 tablespoons Creole mustard or other brown mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lay each piece of sausage on one side of a cabbage leaf, tuck in the sides, and roll the leaf up.
3. Lightly oil the cabbage rolls with 2 tablespoons olive oil. Season the rolls with Essence.
4. Place the rolls on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
5. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the rolls are heated through.
6. In a sauté pan, heat the remaining olive oil. When hot, sauté the onions until golden, about 3-5 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in the shallots, garlic, mustard, beer, and veal reduction. Bring the liquid to a boil and reduce to a simmer.
8. Drizzle in the cane syrup to desired sweetness. Simmer the sauce for 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Remove the cabbage rolls from the oven.
10. Lay the rolls against each other in the center of a shallow pasta bowl. Spoon the sauce over the cabbage rolls.
11. Garnish with long chives, chopped chives, and brunoise peppers.
Yields: 4 servings
